title: Shijing: Guan Ju (Crying Ospreys) - First poem of the Shijing
description: From the Shijing (Book of Songs) — the oldest collection of Chinese poetry, compiled by Confucius from songs of the Zhou dynasty.
introduction: From the Shijing (Book of Songs) — the oldest collection of Chinese poetry, compiled by Confucius from songs of the Zhou dynasty.

translation.text: Guan-guan cry the ospreys on the river island. The modest, retiring, virtuous young lady — for our prince a good mate she. Here long, there short is the duckweed; to the left, to the right, we gather it. The modest, virtuous lady — waking and sleeping he sought her.
